title: Rustins Scratch Cover Medium – Conceal Surface Scratches on Medium-Toned Wood Furniture – Easy-to-Use Liquid Polish for Restoring and Protecting Wooden Surfaces
features: Effectively Conceals Surface Scratches: Rustins Scratch Cover Medium is specially formulated to mask unsightly surface scratches on medium-toned wood furniture, restoring its original appearance and enhancing its natural beauty

Blend of Premium Waxes for Enhanced Protection: This scratch cover contains a blend of beeswax, carnauba wax, and other high-quality waxes, providing a protective layer that not only conceals scratches but also nourishes and preserves the wood's surface

Suitable for New and Old Furniture: Whether you're dealing with recent scratches on new pieces or aiming to rejuvenate older furniture, Rustins Scratch Cover Medium is versatile and effective. ADD TO BASKET now

Easy Application for Immediate Results: Simply apply the scratch cover to the affected area with a soft cloth, leave it for several minutes, and then buff with a clean cloth to reveal a refreshed surface
Made in the UK with Trusted Quality: Proudly manufactured in the UK, Rustins Scratch Cover Medium upholds high-quality standards, ensuring reliable performance and satisfaction with every use
description: From the manufacturer Knotting Available in Light, Medium & Dark. Scratch Cover will mask unsightly surface scratches on wooden furniture. Simply apply the scratch cover to the scratches with a soft cloth and leave for several minutes before rubbing with a clean soft cloth. Several applications may be required if the scratch is deep. Regular use of scratch cover will keep all scratches masked and the surface protected with a film of pure wax. Masks unsightly scratches For new and old furniture Available in light, medium & dark shades Available Sizes 125ml 300ml Rustins Scratch Cover Light Wood 300ml Rustins Scratch Cover Rustins Scratch Cover Light Wood 125ml Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,778 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,778 Price £8.90 £ 8 . 90 £5.95 £ 5 . 95 Available in light, medium & dark shades ✓ ✓
